title: MC CobbleQuest
description: A basic Cobblemon Modpack for an upcoming and named CobbleQuest server.
body:
A basic modpack designed for an upcoming CobbleQuest Server, where we will be discussing various ways of theorycrafting 'mons as well as building techniques, all within the confines of the atmosphere that Cobblemon creates for the end-user.

We aim to generate an atmosphere of competitive comraderie. Whether battling 'Mons or friendly building competitions across the landscape. The goal is succinct, direct and repetitious. Friendly Competition.

This pack includes content by the following;

Genomons: [https://modrinth.com/datapack/genomons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/genomons)

MissingMons: [https://modrinth.com/datapack/missingmons-cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/missingmons-cobblemon)

Pokemanz Pack: [https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-pokemans](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-pokemans)

Gravelmon [https://modrinth.com/datapack/gravelmon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gravelmon)
